name: Bujin Regalia - The Mirror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: At the start of your Main Phase 1, if your opponent controls more monsters than you do and you control a Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster: Until the end of your opponent's next turn, Spell/Trap Cards, and their effects, cannot be activated.
eff: At the start of your Main Phase 1, if your opponent controls more monsters than you do and you control a Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster: Until the end of your opponent's next turn, Spell/Trap Cards, and their effects, cannot be activated.

misc: At the start of Main Phase 1
